scope.target: Validate and close the Use Case and Command Handler boundary workflow
scope.dependency_radius: All files changed by the workflow
constraints: All implementation tasks must be completed or explicitly deferred
Do not close with contradictory active invocation guidance
Record migration and analyzer residual risks
non_goals: No new architecture decisions during closure

inputs.architecture_target: One validated Use Case inbound-port and Handler adapter model

steps: Record residual risks and close workflow
validation: No active context overrides the approved invocation model
